Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Aug-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Motion for Order to Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff Jeanette Reese as Wongful Death Heir and as Successor in Interest to Wilton McManus, deceased.
Laurie Reese present via Court Call, Steven Reese, Karie Reese, Kevin Reese also present in court without separate counsel, were sworn and testified.

After hearing the testimony and considered the evidence both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, and with stipulation by the parties, the Court ordered for distribution of all net settlements funds derived from the personal injury - survival and wrongful death cause of action as following proportions:
Jeanette Reese 70%, Laurie Reese 10%, Steven Reese 10%, Karie Reese 3.334%, Kevin Reese 3.334% and Tracy Watson 3.334%.
Attorneys' Fee and Costs $2,250.00
Order was submitted to and signed by the Court. (See scanned doc. for the details of Order)
